core_components.navbar: Sticky, glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/70`). Logo left. Links center. Primary CTA right. Add `data-testid='navbar'`.
core_components.hero_section: Massive typography. H1 'K BEATS'. Neon abstract background with `bg-black/50` overlay. Use Framer Motion for upward stagger reveal. Add `data-testid='hero-section'`.
core_components.infinite_marquee: Use `react-fast-marquee`. Massive uppercase text (e.g., `text-8xl`), alternating between solid white and stroked outline (`text-transparent [-webkit-text-stroke:2px_#333]`). Add `data-testid='marquee-section'`.
core_components.services_showcase: Horizontal scroll or asymmetrical bento grid. Each card is flat `#1A1A1C` with `1px border-white/10`. Hover state triggers image scale-up and border turns `#ccff00`. Add `data-testid='service-card'`.
core_components.social_integration: Large interactive blocks or a dedicated sidebar. Huge typography for 'YOUTUBE', 'INSTAGRAM', 'SOUNDCLOUD'. Add `data-testid='social-link'`.
core_components.chatbot_widget: Floating button bottom-right with electric lime glow. Opens glassmorphic chat interface. Add `data-testid='chatbot-trigger'` and `data-testid='chatbot-window'`.

animation_guidelines.scroll_library: MUST install and use `@studio-freight/lenis` for smooth scrolling (crucial for the premium feel).
animation_guidelines.scroll_reveal: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 40 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] }}

hero_background.description: Abstract neon streaks for hero banner

events_weddings.description: DJ live performance with blue lasers

instructions_to_main_agent: Replace Shadcn default UI styles entirely for marketing sections. Use raw HTML/Tailwind with Framer Motion.
Do NOT use default Vercel/Stripe looking cards. Go cardless or use sharp 1px borders on flat backgrounds.
Implement the text-based logo snippet provided. DO NOT use placeholder text for images, only use the URLs provided.
Every button, link, and major section MUST have a `data-testid`.
